description: FM-24 (RPN=48): Reasoning agent's FIRST response has finishReason=SAFETY with empty text. The safety filter blocks the reasoning model on its very first turn, before any REPL execution. The orchestrator detects the empty final_answer and yields an [RLM ERROR] event. Tests the FM-24 pathway at reasoning level (not worker level).

responses.note: Reasoning agent's first response is safety-blocked. finishReason=SAFETY, empty text. No REPL execution occurs. ADK stores '' in output_key 'reasoning_output'. Orchestrator detects empty final_answer and yields error.

expected.final_answer: [RLM ERROR] Reasoning agent completed without producing a structured final answer. Check output_schema wiring.
